channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Complete Winners List from the 12th AMVCA Awards in Lagos
item.description: The 12th edition of the Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCA) took place for Eko Hotel and Suites, Lagos, where plenty big names for African film and TV industry gather to celebrate top talent. ...

item.title: British Passengers from Hantavirus-Affected Cruise Ship to Undergo Isolation at NHS Facility
item.description: British passengers and crew aboard the MV Hondius, currently at the centre of a hantavirus outbreak, will be isolated at Arrowe Park Hospital in Wirral, Merseyside. This hospital previously served as ...

item.title: Government Audit Reveals Over 850,000 Non-Existent Students in Kenyan Schools
item.description: A recent nationwide audit by the Kenyan government has uncovered over 850,000 ghost learners in public schools, signalling a major financial leak in the education sector. According to Basic Education ...

item.title: Iran Delays Response to US Amid Gulf Naval Tensions
item.description: Iran has questioned the seriousness of American diplomacy following renewed naval clashes in the Persian Gulf, while keeping Washington waiting on its latest negotiating proposal. Tensions around the ...

item.title: Emmanuel Olawore Nets First Professional Goal for Umea FC in Swedish League Draw
item.description: Young Nigerian footballer Emmanuel Olawore don finally open im professional goal account as he score for Umea FC in their 2-2 draw against Gefle for Sweden’s Ettan Norra division. The 18-year-old atta...

item.title: Tasting and ranking supermarket breakfast teabags
item.description: A detailed tasting of supermarket breakfast teabags reveals standout options across price points, evaluated using professional cupping methods focusing on flavour, structure, balance, certifications, ...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Holds Closed Hearing on Durban Harbour Drug Seizure
item.description: The Judicial Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference and Corruption in the Criminal Justice System is set to hear testimony related to a major drug seizure at Durban harbour on ...

item.title: Israeli air and drone strikes in Lebanon kill at least 17 amid fragile ceasefire
item.description: At least 17 people have been killed in a series of Israeli air and drone strikes across southern Lebanon and areas south of Beirut, according to Lebanese authorities. The attacks come despite a ceasef...

item.title: Brief lava fountaining observed as Mayon Volcano continues prolonged effusive eruption
item.description: A short episode of lava fountaining was observed at Mayon Volcano as its ongoing effusive eruption reached its 126th day, according to recent monitoring reports. Lava fountaining refers to the ejectio...

item.title: Complete List of AMVCA 2026 Winners and Honorees in Lagos
item.description: Na Lagos stars from all over Africa jam come celebrate the biggest achievements for film, TV, and digital content during the AMVCA 2026 on Saturday. Linda Ejiofor-Suleiman take home Best Supporting Ac...

item.title: One Nation Secures Historic Victory in Farrer, Weakening Coalition Hold
item.description: One Nation has achieved a landmark win in the NSW seat of Farrer, signalling a significant shift in Australian politics. Businessman David Farley secured the seat, which had been held by the Liberals ...

item.title: Supriya Sule recounts highway collision but reassures everyone is safe
item.description: On May 9, 2026, NCP (SP) working president Supriya Sule faced a frightening incident while travelling from Pune to Mumbai on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway. Her car was hit from the side by another vehicl...

item.title: APC Clears Rivers Governor Fubara For May 21 Governorship Primary
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Siminalayi Fubara, don get clearance from the All Progressives Congress (APC) to run for the party’s governorship primary wey go hold on May 21. The screening and clearance happ...

item.title: ATM Submits Motion of No Confidence Against President Ramaphosa Following Phala Phala Ruling
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa faces increasing political pressure after the African Transformation Movement (ATM) formally tabled a motion of no confidence in Parliament. The motion seeks the removal of b...

item.title: Labour Faces Internal Debate Over Starmer's Leadership Amid Emerging Challenge
item.description: Labour Party leader Sir Keir Starmer is facing an unusual and explicit challenge from within his own ranks, triggered by former minister Catherine West. Her remarks on Radio 4's PM programme have spar...

item.title: House set to deliberate on impeachment report for Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has repeatedly stated that she will only present her side regarding allegations against her before the Senate acting as an impeachment court. On May 11, 2026, the plenary s...

item.title: Bangladesh Expresses Concern Over Rising Push-Ins from India After West Bengal Elections
item.description: The recent landslide victory of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) in West Bengal has heightened concerns in Bangladesh regarding the practice of 'push-ins'—the forced entry of individuals from India in...

item.title: Caitlin Clark and Paige Bueckers Lead Exciting WNBA Season Opener
item.description: The WNBA kicked off its 30th season with an electrifying opening weekend, featuring a highly anticipated matchup between Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark and Dallas Wings standout Paige Bueckers. Fans...

item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has commended Hillside Aluminium on reaching its 30-year milestone, recognising its significant contribution to South Africa’s industrial growth, job creation, and skills dev...

item.title: Malami Declares Kebbi Governorship Ambition Under ADC Ahead of 2027 Election
